method: source audit plus test discovery; focused Jest/API/action and broader direct API/security commands executed; local E2E database readiness repaired; listing-edit/status/delete Chromium coverage executed and passes; latest full create/listing-edit/dedupe Chromium gate executed and passes after LM-G006 focused diagnosis

Edit listing page/form/PATCH behavior is documented from source evidence.
Delete, can-delete, and status action behavior is documented from source evidence.

claims.discrepancy: Source evidence, test inventory, focused Jest/API/action coverage, broader direct API/security coverage, local DB readiness repair, Chromium browser execution evidence, and focused failure diagnosis exist. Listing-edit/status/delete browser coverage passes for the current host-managed UI: listing-edit passed 10 with 1 retained dev-server redirect skip, status/delete passed 2/2, and the listing-edit folder passed 12 with 1 skipped. The latest full create/listing-edit/dedupe Chromium gate passed with 117 passed and 2 skipped after closing LM-G006. Verification remains partial because live HTTP/curl checks, broader component/schema inventory, migration SQL line audit, storage-provider cleanup checks, and LE-01 redirect determinism remain outside this pass.
claims.recommendedFix: Run live HTTP/curl mutation checks, broader component/schema tests, migration SQL audit, and storage-provider cleanup verification; revisit LE-01 if unauthenticated edit redirects become deterministic in E2E.

claims.claim: The listing-management browser-flow verification attempts, environment repair, visual fixes, listing-edit/status/delete coverage, latest broad gate result, and remaining gaps are documented with exact command evidence.

claims.claim: Listing-management direct API route-handler and CSRF helper behavior has docs-safe verification evidence for create, edit, delete, status, status/cache headers, auth/ownership, idempotency, and duplicate-submit/collision behavior.
Migration-backed listing/canonical-inventory invariants are fully line-audited.
claims.discrepancy: Relevant migration paths were discovered, but migration SQL was not line-audited in this pass.
claims.recommendedFix: Line-audit relevant migration SQL and update 06-data-model-and-invariants.md.

coverageGaps.gap: Listing-edit/status/delete browser coverage exists and passes, closing LM-G001. The latest full create/listing-edit/dedupe Chromium gate is green, closing LM-G006. One retained listing-edit redirect skip remains documented as LE-01.
Direct API route-handler/security tests passed, but live Next server/curl checks for listing mutation cache/header behavior and route-level CSRF rejection were not run.
Focused and broader direct API/security commands passed and selected browser specs executed, but component/schema tests outside those commands were not executed in this pass.
Migration paths were discovered, but SQL line ranges were not audited for every invariant.
Best-effort storage cleanup is source-observed but not provider-runtime verified.
